items.name: app-brand
items.title: App Brand
items.description: A compact TanStack Router brand link with a semantic icon, app name, and subtitle.
items.docs:
## Overview

`app-brand` provides a small reusable brand link for app shells, home page headers, and navigation chrome. It keeps the icon container, label, and subtitle visually consistent across pages.

## Usage

```tsx
import { AppBrand } from "@/components/app-brand";
import { Blocks } from "lucide-react";

<AppBrand label="Krakstack" subtitle="Documentation" icon={Blocks} />
```

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A URL-state-driven data table with filtering, sorting, column visibility, CSV export, gallery view, grouping, and drag-and-drop row moves.
items.docs:
## Overview

`data-table` provides a production-oriented table shell around TanStack Table. It keeps search, pagination, sorting, grouping, and view mode in the URL so table state can be linked, refreshed, and shared.

## Features

- URL-backed state through `TableSearchSchema`
- Search, sorting, pagination, and column visibility
- CSV export for the current table data
- Table and gallery display modes
- Optional grouping with row movement callbacks
- Reusable action column helper

## Usage

```tsx
import { DataTable, DataTableColumnHeader } from "@/components/data-table";

<DataTable
  columns={columns}
  data={rows}
  exportFileName="rows.csv"
  from="/your-route"
/>
```

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: A TanStack Form setup with reusable field wrappers, text inputs, text areas, selects, multi-selects, key/value editing, file uploads, submit state, and dirty-navigation blocking.
items.docs:
## Overview

`form` creates an application form hook with reusable field components for common admin and product workflows. It standardizes labels, descriptions, validation messages, submit state, file inputs, image inputs, and dirty-navigation protection.

## Features

- Typed `useAppForm` hook built on TanStack Form
- Text, textarea, select, multi-select, checkbox, file, image, and key/value fields
- Field wrappers for grouped form sections
- Submit button wired to form submission state
- Dirty-navigation confirmation through TanStack Router
- Localized component messages

## Usage

```tsx
const form = useAppForm({
  defaultValues: { name: "Ada" },
  onSubmit: async ({ value }) => save(value),
});

<form.AppForm>
  <form.AppField name="name">
    {(field) => <field.TextField label="Name" />}
  </form.AppField>
</form.AppForm>
```

items.name: locale-toggle
items.title: Locale Toggle
items.description: A Paraglide-powered dropdown for switching between configured locales with localized language labels.
items.docs:
## Overview

`locale-toggle` provides a compact language switcher for Paraglide projects. It reads the current locale from Paraglide, lists the configured locales, and updates the active locale from a dropdown menu.

## Features

- Uses Paraglide `getLocale`, `setLocale`, and `locales`
- Localized menu label and locale names
- Icon-only trigger with accessible screen-reader text
- Includes component-scoped message files

## Usage

```tsx
import { LocaleToggle } from "@/components/locale-toggle";

<LocaleToggle />
```

items.name: user-button
items.title: User Button
items.description: A Better Auth user menu with account editing, localized labels, and sign-out handling.
items.docs:
## Overview

`user-button` provides a compact authenticated-user dropdown for Better Auth projects. It reads the current user from the app-local `authClient.useSession()`, opens an account dialog for updating the user's name, and signs the user out with an optional redirect.

## Features

- Better Auth `useSession`, `updateUser`, and `signOut` integration
- Account dialog with the local `form` registry block
- Localized menu and form labels
- Configurable sign-out redirect
- Configurable dropdown side

## Usage

```tsx
import { UserButton } from "@/components/user-button";

<UserButton signOutRedirect="/" side="bottom" />
```

items.name: sign-in
items.title: Sign In
items.description: A Better Auth email/password sign-in card with TanStack Form validation and localized labels.
items.docs:
## Overview

`sign-in` provides a self-contained email/password sign-in card for Better Auth projects. It submits credentials through `authClient.signIn.email()`, displays form-level errors, and links to the sign-up route.

## Features

- Better Auth email/password sign-in
- TanStack Form state and submit handling
- Localized labels, descriptions, and errors
- Card-based layout ready to drop into a route

## Usage

```tsx
import { SignIn } from "@/components/sign-in";

<main className="grid min-h-screen place-items-center px-6 py-10">
  <SignIn />
</main>
```

items.name: sign-up
items.title: Sign Up
items.description: A Better Auth email/password registration card with TanStack Form validation and localized labels.
items.docs:
## Overview

`sign-up` provides a self-contained account creation card for Better Auth projects. It creates users through `authClient.signUp.email()`, displays form-level errors, and links back to the sign-in route.

## Features

- Better Auth email/password registration
- Name, email, and password fields
- TanStack Form state and submit handling
- Localized labels, descriptions, and errors

## Usage

```tsx
import { SignUp } from "@/components/sign-up";

<main className="grid min-h-screen place-items-center px-6 py-10">
  <SignUp />
</main>
```

items.name: krakstack-auth
items.title: Krakstack Auth
items.description: A Better Auth foundation for TanStack Start that connects to Krakstack Auth via OAuth, with server config, React client, an /api/auth route handler, and an Effect auth service with HttpApiMiddleware.

items.name: service-database
items.title: Database
items.description: An Effect service that provides a Drizzle PostgreSQL client from DATABASE_URL with pg type parsing configured for application-safe date and interval handling.

items.name: service-opentelemetry
items.title: OpenTelemetry
items.description: An Effect service that sets up OpenTelemetry traces, metrics, and log export via OTLP using Effect's unstable observability and HTTP modules, with Effect Logger bridging so all application logs are sent to the collector.

items.name: krakstack-template
items.title: KrakStack Template
items.description: A full-stack TanStack Start template with Effect HTTP, Drizzle PostgreSQL, Paraglide i18n, shadcn UI, and a task CRUD reference implementation.
items.docs:
## Overview

`krakstack-template` is the starter app used for new KrakStack projects. It combines TanStack Start, Effect, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, shadcn UI, Better Auth wiring, and Paraglide i18n in a working task CRUD application.

## GitHub

View the template source on GitHub: [apps/template](https://github.com/krakcons/krakstack/tree/main/apps/template).

## Included Patterns

- TanStack Start with file-based routing and SSR
- Effect HTTP API with generated OpenAPI and Scalar documentation
- Drizzle PostgreSQL schema and migration setup
- Effect services for database and OpenTelemetry
- Effect Atom client state with optimistic task mutations
- Paraglide English/French i18n and localized routing
- shadcn UI primitives plus KrakStack data table, form, locale toggle, app brand, and sidebar layout

## Usage

Clone or copy the template from GitHub, then install and run it with Bun:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/krakcons/krakstack.git
cd krakstack/apps/template
bun install
cp .env.example .env
bunx drizzle-kit push
bun --bun run dev
```

Open `http://localhost:3000` after the dev server starts. See the template README for devenv setup, database details, and demo-removal notes.

items.name: sidebar-layout
items.title: Sidebar Layout
items.description: A sidebar-based layout with configurable navigation groups, a brand header, page header component, locale toggle, and user button.
items.docs:
## Overview

`sidebar-layout` provides a sidebar-based layout for applications using TanStack Router. It includes a configurable sidebar with brand header and navigation groups, a page header component with optional badge, description, and actions, and a locale toggle in the top bar.

## Features

- Configurable sidebar with brand header and grouped navigation
- Active link detection via TanStack Router
- Collapsible icon sidebar with `SidebarProvider`
- `SidebarPageHeader` with optional badge, description, and actions
- Customizable header end content (defaults to `LocaleToggle` and `UserButton`)
- Uses `Outlet` or `children` for content rendering

## Usage

```tsx
import { SidebarLayout, SidebarPageHeader, type NavGroup } from "@/components/sidebar-layout";
import { LayoutDashboard, Users } from "lucide-react";

const brand = {
  label: () => "My App",
  subtitle: () => "Admin Panel",
  icon: LayoutDashboard,
  href: "/admin",
};

const groups: NavGroup[] = [
  {
    label: () => "Navigation",
    items: [
      { label: () => "Dashboard", href: "/admin", icon: LayoutDashboard },
      { label: () => "Users", href: "/admin/users", icon: Users },
    ],
  },
];

<SidebarLayout brand={brand} groups={groups} />
```

For pages with custom content:

```tsx
<SidebarLayout brand={brand} groups={groups}>
  <SidebarPageHeader title="Users" description="Manage users" />
</SidebarLayout>
```
